title: alternanthera praelonga
intro: Alternanthera praelonga, also known as the 'Purple Fountain Plant', is a type of flowering plant species belonging to the Amaranthaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Alternanthera praelonga include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in wound healing. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine.
